description:
Create a new requirement at the end of the flight control system SRS document. Set the heading to 'Altitude Control Loop' and include the following description with the PID control law formula in LaTeX block format:

The system shall calculate the control output u(t) based on the error e(t) using the standard PID algorithm:
$$ u(t) = K_p e(t) + K_i \int_0^t e(\tau) d\tau + K_d \frac{de(t)}{dt} $$

Save the project after completing the entry.
